negative_prompts.general: low quality, blurry, distorted, deformed, ugly, duplicate, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, out of frame

negative_prompts.photorealistic: painting, drawing, illustration, cartoon, anime, 3d render, cgi, unrealistic, plastic look, oversaturated
negative_prompts.portrait: disfigured, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn face, mutation, mutated, extra limbs, extra fingers, malformed limbs, missing arms, missing legs, extra arms, extra legs, fused fingers, too many fingers, long neck, cross-eyed
